# Feature Implementation Template

## Purpose

Guide safe implementation of new features.

## Reference When

Use before adding user-visible behavior.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Fill the planning sections before coding when the feature is non-trivial.

## Template

```md
# Feature: <name>

## Goal

## Non-Goals

## User Flow

## Architecture

Owning modules:
New or changed contracts:

## Risks

Compatibility:
Security/privacy:
Performance:

## Rollback

## Tests

- Unit:
- Integration:
- CLI:
- Docs/examples:

## Documentation Updates

## Definition of Done
```
